llm.langgraph_nodes: Per-node model mapping. Keys correspond to node ids in the LangGraph builder.
llm.provider: Active backend key. Must exist in llm_backends.json.
llm.roles: Role-to-model mapping for the active backend.

thalamus.dev_mode: Use dev-mode paths and disable install-time path resolution.
thalamus.max_sql_rows: Hard cap on SQL rows returned from episodes query.

retrieval.default_k: Default retrieval top-k for ad hoc memory queries.

prefill.agent_k: Bootstrap recall count for the current-agent memory socket.
prefill.shared_k: Bootstrap recall count for the shared memory socket.
prefill.user_k: Bootstrap recall count for the current-user memory socket.

thalamus.var_dir_override: Override var directory if you want to store state elsewhere.

chat.max_visible_lines: Max lines to keep in chat view.

spaces.max_items: Max spaces to show in the UI list.
